task_completion.description: Navigate to the Catalog Configuration page in the Magento Admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin panel is visible, and the user is on the Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Catalog page.

task_completion.description: Set the Storefront List Mode to 'Grid Only'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the expanded 'Storefront' section, the 'List Mode' dropdown is set to 'Grid Only'. The 'Use system value' checkbox next to it must be unchecked if previously inherited.

task_completion.description: Set the allowed Products per Page on Grid values to '12,24,48'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Storefront' section, the 'Products per Page on Grid Allowed Values' text input field contains exactly '12,24,48'.

task_completion.description: Set the default Products per Page on Grid to '24'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Storefront' section, the 'Products per Page on Grid Default Value' text input field contains exactly '24'.

task_completion.description: Set the Product Listing Sort by to 'Price'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Storefront' section, the 'Product Listing Sort by' dropdown is set to 'Price'.

task_completion.description: Enable the Canonical Link Meta Tag for both Categories and Products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the expanded 'Search Engine Optimization' section, both 'Use Canonical Link Meta Tag For Categories' and 'Use Canonical Link Meta Tag For Products' dropdowns are set to 'Yes'.
A green success message stating 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the page, confirming the settings were applied.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the browser and Magento GUI elements (dropdowns, text fields, buttons) rather than using a terminal to execute `bin/magento config:set` commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Magento 2 Admin interface with its standard layout, sidebar, and configuration menus, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message and updated fields appear naturally after clicking the 'Save Config' button, without the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) being open to manipulate the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In Magento 2, these settings are located in Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Catalog. 'List Mode' set to 'Grid Only' corresponds to the internal value 'grid'. 'Products per Page on Grid Allowed Values' must be exactly '12,24,48'. 'Products per Page on Grid Default Value' must be '24'. 'Product Listing Sort by' set to 'Price' corresponds to internal value 'price'. For SEO, enabling Canonical Link Meta Tags for Categories and Products means setting their respective dropdowns to 'Yes' (internal value '1').
